response.justification: Despite a broad and impressive engineering background across languages and domains, the candidate shows minimal evidence of deep JVM, Java/Kotlin, or enterprise framework (Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus) experience — critical for this role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only passing mentions of Java in legacy or non-core contexts, and no demonstrable IDE tooling or language server experience.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse tech stacks and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement
Proven ability to lead and teach through workshops and documentation
concerns: Lack of demonstrated Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem expertise
No visible experience with IDE internals, language tooling, or JVM tooling
Primary tech focus (TypeScript/Node.js/DLang) misaligned with core JVM requirements
